workOrder.title: Student requirement guidance nudges
workOrder.summary: Show student-safe requirement descriptions and one quality nudge in the Your Required Work checklist.

repoGroundedFindings: The student dashboard route already loaded scoped requirements and returned a read-only checklist.
The checklist showed phase, status, due label, version, and next action, but not persisted requirement descriptions.
Seeded quality_checks.prompt records already provide student-facing guidance without adding a route, fake page, or write path.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor assignment, student access, migration, D1 config, secret, OAuth, Cloudflare, deploy, or live-data behavior changed.
Requirement descriptions and quality prompts come from existing requirement metadata already scoped through /api/student/dashboard.

validation.notes: Full required validation passed for the student requirement guidance slice. npm run verify:functionality-ux-automation initially failed because nextRecommendedWorkOrders lost a required Review Queue handoff phrase; the state summary was corrected and the verifier passed. git diff --check reported CRLF normalization warnings only. No browser smoke was run because this read-only student dashboard UI change is covered by focused route and workspace render tests plus source verifiers. No remote seed/reset/migration, live data write, deploy, credential repair, domain/OAuth, or Cloudflare config change was run.

nextRecommendedWork: Add a guided student-safe requirement form only if it uses persisted requirement/progress/deadline records and existing authorized submission/evidence endpoints.
Prove exact missing/evidence drill-down mapping before exposing a staff control.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add student requirement descriptions or quality nudges unless a regression removes the route payload or UI markers.
